articles.description: Coventry boss Frank Lampard is attracting interest from Premier League clubs - but talks with the Sky Blues are key to his future.
articles.title: Frank Lampard: Coventry boss talks key to future amid Premier League links

articles.description: Saudi Arabia will withdraw its multi-billion dollar backing of LIV Golf at the end of the season, plunging the future of the series into doubt.
articles.title: LIV Golf: Saudi Arabia to withdraw funding at end of season

articles.description: Kobbie Mainoo signs a new contract with Manchester United that will keep him at Old Trafford until 2031.
articles.title: Kobbie Mainoo: Manchester United midfielder signs new contract until 2031

articles.description: John Higgins produces a battling display to draw level at 4-4 against Shaun Murphy in the opening session of their World Championship semi-final.
articles.title: World Championship 2026: John Higgins battles back to level semi-final with Shaun Murphy

articles.description: Former England and Chelsea captain Millie Bright speaks to BBC Sport a day after announcing her retirement.
articles.title: Millie Bright: Former England and Chelsea captain on abuse, retirement and the future

articles.description: Henry Pollock has signed with Eddie Hearn's talent agency in the hope of boosting his profile, but why has rugby found it so hard to forge mainstream figureheads?
articles.title: Henry Pollock: Rugby's search for a crossover star

articles.description: A stronger and faster Sonny Baker is ready to put last summer's difficult white-ball debuts for England behind him.
articles.title: Sonny Baker: England bowler hoping for Test debut this summer

articles.description: Burnley head coach Scott Parker leaves the club following talks with the club's hierarchy.
articles.title: Burnley: Scott Parker leaves as head coach after relegation from Premier League

articles.description: Tottenham's Premier League relegation struggles are "difficult to accept", says former manager Mauricio Pochettino.
articles.title: Tottenham: Mauricio Pochettino 'sad' to see Spurs suffering

articles.description: Shakhtar Donetsk go into their Uefa Conference League semi-final tie against Crystal Palace on Thursday hoping to make their country proud.
articles.title: 'We lost our home but not our identity' - Shakhtar Donetsk eye European success
